title: Refactoring safety net (baseline snapshot + regression detection)
description: Implement safety-net engine: captureSnapshot records exports, function signatures, file hashes, and test results. compareSnapshot detects removed exports, changed files, and test regressions. New command: spec-graph safety-net [--compare]. Tested on spec-graph: 56 files, 211 exports, 546 tests captured.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
